title: Dream Game
description:
Experience the Ultimate Blend of Death Game × Strategy RPG × Multi-Ending Scenario!

A high-difficulty strategy RPG where a peaceful daytime school life intersects with a deadly nighttime death game. The time limit is a mere 10 days, spanning from August 1st to August 10th in-game! Prepare yourself by exploring the town during the limited daytime, and dive into tense battles at night where strategic grid movement and split-second decisions mean the difference between life and death! Under the extreme tension of "Die twice and it's an instant Game Over," navigate through branching multi-endings and let your choices lead you to the truth on the 10th day!

【Split-Second Decisions Determine the Victor! Tense Battle System】Wring out every ounce of your wisdom! Items, adjacency effects, map skills... use everything at your disposal to dominate the board! Furthermore, close-quarters combat occurs where a moment's hesitation is fatal! Unleash flashy special moves with perfect timing! Otherwise, the enemy's lethal attacks will strike you down! Battles proceed automatically, but players can intervene in the tide of battle by selecting commands.

• Skills: A crucial element that serves as both offense and a defense that robs the enemy of their time! Freely combine the 10 skills available for each character and chain your combos!

• Position Change: Switching formations according to the situation is the key to survival.

• Vanguard: Increases attack power and SP recovery rate. However, defense is slightly lowered.

• Midguard: A balanced stance for offense and defense. Increases accuracy, evasion, and critical rate.

• Rearguard: Increases defense but lowers attack power. Reduces skill damage taken from enemies, so switch with good timing to defend!

• Retreat: Temporarily retreat from combat. Enduring longer allows your allies to recover.

• First Aid: Restores a small amount of HP. Hold on until the very last second!

【Explore the Town and Find the Means to Survive】The daytime is your chance to freely explore the town! Find items that will give you an edge in the high-difficulty night battles, and discover events that hold the key to the story!

• Items: Found items can be used in battle. Search every corner and collect as many as you can.

• Time Limit: Moving, talking, and all other actions consume time. Achieve your goals within the limited time available.

• Exploration Rate: By increasing your exploration rate, you will be able to visit those locations in the nighttime Dream World as well. The night might offer different discoveries than the day...?

• Field Battles: While exploring the Dream World, battles with monsters may suddenly occur...

• Events: There may be others in the same predicament. Visit various places and take action!

【An Overwhelmingly Massive Multi-Ending Scenario】An unreasonable death game suddenly erupts from a peaceful daily life! Experience laughter, tears, and tragedy. An overwhelmingly massive scenario unfolds, rivaling full-scale adventure games. Although the story spans only 10 days in-game (August 1st to 10th), it guarantees satisfaction that goes far beyond the timeframe. It features a multi-ending system—simply playing won't be enough to reach the truth!

◇ PrologueI had a creepy dream... But after all, a dream is just a dream... or so it was supposed to be.

A harmless little charm called the "Sleep Letter" was the beginning of it all. Waiting in the "Dream World" you are dragged into every night is a desperate struggle against mysterious monsters. Set in a familiar town, a deadly game against grotesque entities begins!

In this surreal environment, "fear of death," "trust in friends," and "life and death" collide. As the feelings of the youths intertwine, the story edges closer to the truth. —Liberate the dream!!

【Other Game Systems】This title incorporates the following systems for a comfortable gameplay experience:

• Auto-save during battles

• Difficulty adjustment feature

• Game speed adjustment (Requires unlocking)

• Battle skip feature (Requires unlocking)

• Sound Room (Requires unlocking)

【Regarding Let's Plays & Streaming】Let's Plays and video streaming are highly welcome! (*However, we may contact you regarding content that includes excessive slander or defamation that damages the image of the work.)

【Additional Notes】The predecessor to this title, Dream Game, was previously distributed on Android/iOS. (*Currently discontinued.) This title is a ported and adjusted version for PC.
description_short: Triggered by the "Sleep Letter", an endless nightmare begins. Day: Race against time to forge your destiny. Night: Survive high-stakes, real-time tactical battles. Die twice? Instant Game Over. Countless fates intertwine in the multi-ending SRPG DREAM GAME. Will you survive tonight?
